expectations.text: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698' at the start
expectations.evidence: Transcript announcement: 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698.'

expectations.text: Calls getJiraIssue with ticket key WEBR-698
expectations.evidence: Tools Called: getJiraIssue called with comprend.atlassian.net + WEBR-698 → success. Ticket data extracted.

expectations.text: Checks for uncommitted changes before branching
expectations.evidence: Branch Operations: 'git status --porcelain (Bash — denied; state inferred from session-start git status: clean)'. Bash was denied, so the check was inferred, not actually executed.
Branch name: feature/WEBR-698-not-a-work-item-just-for-testing-claude. Story type correctly maps to feature/ prefix.

expectations.text: Prints summary table with Ticket, Type, Branch, and Tier fields
expectations.evidence: Summary Output section shows full table with all 4 required fields.

expectations.text: Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue and transitionJiraIssue to transition ticket to In Progress
expectations.evidence: Jira Transition section: getTransitionsForJiraIssue called → 'Ready to be started' only, no In Progress. transitionJiraIssue not called (correct graceful degradation per skill spec Step 2h).

expectations.text: Tier assessment correctly reflects ticket data (Simple for low-AC/unset-points Story, not defaulting to Complex)
expectations.evidence: Tier: Simple. Reason: Story, 1 AC, unset points → matches new Simple rule for Story. Old skill would have defaulted to Complex via fallback.

summary.note: 1 failure: Bash was denied in subagent context so git status check was inferred not executed. All logic correct. Key win: tier correctly assessed as Simple (old skill gave Complex via fallback). Transition gracefully degraded (no In Progress transition on test ticket).
